Engineering Onboarding Guide: Welcome to the engineering team! Your first week will focus on environment setup, codebase orientation, and meeting your teammates. You will be assigned a buddy engineer who will be your primary resource for questions during the first month. The development environment is containerized via Docker Compose; follow the README in the platform-core repository to get your local stack running. By the end of week two, you should have completed your first small PR, attended a sprint planning, and reviewed the system architecture overview document linked in Confluence.
